title: Aurora, Official Merchandise, 61618, Tiddler Fish 8in, Soft Toy, Blue
features: Embark on a magical journey with Tiddler, the enchanting 8-inch, blue fish plush that brings the wonder of bedtime stories to life! Inspired by the book Tiddler, this cuddly and charismatic creature is a fantastical friend ready to ignite the imagination of children.

100% Official Licensed Merchandise. - From the award-winning author Julia Donaldson and illustrator Axel Scheffler, the creator of The Gruffalo, this book was first published in 2007, the story of a small loveable fish, who tells the tallest tales in the ocean is loved by millions.

This blue-coloured fish is crafted with the utmost care and has a plush exterior that feels soft to the touch. With its velvety smooth texture and irresistibly big bobbly eyes, this charming fish is ready to swim its way into your heart. It is not just a toy; it's a plush pal that sparks joy and warmth. Suitable from birth.

Tiddler is a memorable gift that transcends age boundaries. Whether it's a birthday surprise, a holiday treat, or a "just because" gesture, Tiddler Fish is a magical companion that brings smiles to faces and joy to hearts. This is an amazing gift for anyone who loves the book. Don't miss the chance to bring the perfect companion for adventures big and small.

This Fish soft toy is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hang tags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials. As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Unleash the power of play, imagination, and cuddles with this 8-inch soft toy that's destined to become a cherished member of your family. Order now and let the adventures begin!
